perturbation.original_text: F. "Licensed Products" shall mean BlackMP Living Water, BlackMP Concentrate, Zezel Probiotic Water, Zayin Sports Water, Gridiron CBD H2O Probioticsâ„˘ Water, Gridiron MVPâ„˘ and Gridiron MVPâ„˘ Concentrate using the Pro Football Legends Logo on the Licensed Products' affixed labels, hang-tags or packaging. Other products of the Company may be added to the list of Licensed Products during the Contract Period by written amendment to this Agreement. All amendments to this Agreement must be signed by all parties to this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: F. "Licensed Products" shall mean only BlackMP Living Water and BlackMP Concentrate using the Pro Football Legends Logo on the Licensed Products' affixed labels, hang-tags or packaging. Other products of the Company may be added to the list of Licensed Products during the Contract Period by written amendment to this Agreement. All amendments to this Agreement must be signed by all parties to this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By omitting specific products (Zezel Probiotic Water, Zayin Sports Water, Gridiron CBD H2O Probioticsâ„˘ Water, Gridiron MVPâ„˘ and Gridiron MVPâ„˘ Concentrate) from the definition of 'Licensed Products', while Section Four still references them for donation calculations, an internal contradiction is created. This raises questions about which products are subject to the donation clause and whether sales of the omitted products should trigger donations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: C. A *donation of $0.05 per Unit sold of Licensed Products within the Contract Territory payable to the **NFL Alumni Northern California Chapter. Donated amounts will be allocated and dispersed to the Northern California Chapter beginning on the first full quarter [three (3) month period] of the Agreement and continue on a quarterly basis thereafter for the term of this Agreement. Where the following per Unit conversion shall apply for the term of this Agreement: a. (1) Bottle of BlackMP LivingWater = 1 Unit b. (1) 4oz bottle of BlackMPConcentrate = 30 Units c. (1) Bottle of Zezel ProbioticWater = 1 Unit d. (1) Bottle of Zayin Sports Water = 1 Unit e. (1) Bottle Gridiron MVPâ„˘ Water= 1 Unit f. (1) Bottle Gridiron CBD H20 Probioticsâ„˘ Water = 1 Unit g. (1) 4oz bottle of Gridiron MVPâ„˘Concentrate = 30 Units _____________ * The NFLA-NC will donate 15% of the above described proceeds to the NFLA. ** The Company will provide to the NFLA-NC upon request the most recent quarterly sales report of the Company's Licensed Products.
perturbation.justification: The changed text narrows the definition of 'Licensed Products' by omitting specific items. The contradicted text (Section C) explicitly lists these omitted products (e.g., Zezel Probiotic Water, Zayin Sports Water) and assigns a 'Unit' value to each for donation calculations. This creates a direct contradiction, as the changed definition implies these omitted products are no longer subject to the donation clause, while Section C clearly states that they are. This directly violates the conditions defined in 'Omissions - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.changed_text: a. (1) Bottle of BlackMP LivingWater = 1 Unit b. (1) 4oz bottle of BlackMPConcentrate = 30 Units
perturbation.explanation: By removing the unit conversion for Zezel ProbioticWater, Zayin Sports Water, Gridiron MVPâ„˘ Water, Gridiron CBD H20 Probioticsâ„˘ Water, and Gridiron MVPâ„˘Concentrate while still referencing them as part of donation calcualtions under the modified definition of the 'Licensed Products' from the previous perturbation (which still included them). If these products are sold, the contract now provides no mechanism to calculate the donation amount, creating ambiguity and hindering enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: C. A *donation of $0.05 per Unit sold of Licensed Products within the Contract Territory payable to the **NFL Alumni Northern California Chapter. Donated amounts will be allocated and dispersed to the Northern California Chapter beginning on the first full quarter [three (3) month period] of the Agreement and continue on a quarterly basis thereafter for the term of this Agreement. Where the following per Unit conversion shall apply for the term of this Agreement: a. (1) Bottle of BlackMP LivingWater = 1 Unit b. (1) 4oz bottle of BlackMPConcentrate = 30 Units _____________ * The NFLA-NC will donate 15% of the above described proceeds to the NFLA. ** The Company will provide to the NFLA-NC upon request the most recent quarterly sales report of the Company's Licensed Products.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the unit conversion factors for several 'Licensed Products' (Zezel ProbioticWater, Zayin Sports Water, Gridiron MVPâ„˘ Water, Gridiron CBD H20 Probioticsâ„˘ Water, and Gridiron MVPâ„˘Concentrate) that were previously included. The contradicted text describes a donation of $0.05 per Unit sold of Licensed Products, with a specific conversion table for calculating the number of Units. By removing the conversion factors for some of the Licensed Products, the contract now lacks a mechanism to calculate the donation amount for those products if they are sold. This creates a direct conflict and ambiguity regarding how the donation will be calculated, making the donation clause potentially unenforceable with respect to those products. This aligns with the definition of 'Omissions â€“ In Text Contradiction' because essential language has been removed, creating a contradiction with obligations stated in other sections.
